scripts.build: pnpm --filter @artmuseum/shared build && pnpm --filter @artmuseum/web build && pnpm --filter @artmuseum/api build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @artmuseum/shared build && pnpm --filter @artmuseum/web typecheck && pnpm --filter @artmuseum/api typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @artmuseum/shared test && pnpm --filter @artmuseum/api test && pnpm --filter @artmuseum/web test
scripts.test:api:py: pnpm --filter @artmuseum/shared build && pnpm --filter @artmuseum/api build && uv run --python 3.9 --with-requirements tests/api/requirements.txt pytest tests/api
